title: Orange Town Under Buggy’s Shadow
description: On pages 5–8, the Orange Town conflict focuses on Luffy, Nami, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, with Buggy’s occupation testing Luffy, Zoro, Nami, and the townspeople.
scene: This part follows the pressure inside Orange Town as Buggy’s crew, the Straw Hats, and the people caught between them react to the escalating fight.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But if you do get that map from buggy...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: then- and only then- will I consider teaming up with you again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: RORDOA ZOLO!! HAVE A TASTE OF THE GREATEST OF ALL MY CIRCUS TRICKS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And now "The Dance of a Hundred Kamikaze TOPS"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: CIRCUS TRICK: "A HIKE IN THE MOUNTAINS."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Circus trick: "Fire- Works in the cool summer breeze."

summary: The scene keeps the Orange Town arc moving by tying the immediate battle to the town’s fear, Nami’s motives, and Luffy’s instinct to answer cruelty directly.
